innateAbility.name: Distortion Field
innateAbility.description: Grants an incoming ranged attack projectile slow aura that affects all allied heroes within the radius.

abilities.name: Time Walk
abilities.description: Rushes to a target location while healing up from any damage taken in the last few seconds.

abilities.name: Reverse Time Walk
abilities.description: Available for a short time after landing Time Walk.If used in a certain time period, Faceless Void will reverse time walk back to the previous and first cast location.

abilities.name: Time Dilation
abilities.description: Applies a time dilation debuff to enemy units within the radius, decelerating their cooldowns.

abilities.name: Time Lock
abilities.description: Adds a chance for an attack to lock an enemy unit in time while attacking it a second time.

abilities.name: Chronosphere
abilities.description: Trap all units caught within the radius and causes Faceless Void to move very quickly inside it.Reveals invisible enemy units within the sphere.
